publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-11-04 23:25:10 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.physdesc: Audio recordings, manuscripts, photographs, publications, video
did.abstract: Collection includes film production records, flyers, posters, original art, videos, audio, oral histories, photographs, slides, and vinyl recordings documenting early hip hop culture and the film "Wild Style."

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
bioghist.p: Charlie Ahearn (born 1951) is a New York City film director and creative artist. Although mainly involved in film and video production, he is also known as an author and radio host. He wrote, directed, and produced the 1983 hip-hop film "Wild Style."

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Collection includes film production records, flyers, posters, original art, videos, audio, oral histories, photographs, slides, and vinyl recordings documenting early hip hop culture and the film "Wild Style."

accessrestrict.head: Access Restrictions:
accessrestrict.p: Access restricted to the permission of the curator.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: Researchers may view one folder at a time.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: Due to the fragility and potential degradation of moving image and sound recordings, viewing and listening is limited to items that have been digitized. If an item is in another media format, you may request to have the item digitized for access. Information on ordering access copies may be found on the Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections webpage.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Charlie Ahearn Hip Hop Archive, #8078. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: Audio visual media that has been digitized: TR-15800 to TR-15819, TR-15822 to TR-15837, F-389, V-6041 to V-6045, V-6051 to V-6063.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: Use of digitized audio visual materials is limited to on-site access only.

controlaccess.subject: Disc jockeys.
Break dancing -- New York (State) -- New York.
Graffiti -- New York (State) -- New York.
Rap (Music) -- New York (State) -- New York.
Hip-hop -- New York (State) -- New York.
controlaccess.title: Wild style (Motion picture)

did.unittitle: Wild Style fliers, publicity materials, xerox images
Wardance Treatment and Hip Hop over Tokyo
Kell Futura Train and Wild Style Back
Tribe Called Quest article and draft
Rakim, Big Daddy Kane album articles
Rocking: Gang culture and the beginning of hip-hop paper
Wild Style hat, belt, and miscellany
Lee Quinones canvas city scape, painted on location. Wild style.
Binder 3: Slides: Ahearn Original EMP scans
Binder 4: Slides: Wild Style: Cathy Campbell originals; Marty Cooper originals; Ulli Rimkis originals
